title: AI Cinematic 3D Toy
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a polished cinematic 3D toy-style portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a polished high-end 3D animated portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, key facial features, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, outfit colors, and scene context. Use stylized toy-like proportions, expressive eyes, smooth materials, soft studio lighting, premium family-film rendering, and a clean cinematic animated 3D finish.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, changed identity, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, unrelated objects, low quality, blurry, uncanny, over-smoothed skin
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. polished 3D toy portrait, cinematic lighting...
